subject: A wild-eyed human wizard assistant working in a cluttered alchemical laboratory, bulging eyes and manic grin, surrounded by glassware and specimens
description: A balding, hollow-cheeked human assistant with enormous bulging eyes and a deranged, fixated expression hunches forward in a laboratory crammed with glass jars, beakers, flasks, and bottled specimens. The lighting is cool blue-cyan with hints of teal and pale violet, giving the scene an icy, clinical, slightly nauseous quality. Shelves and racks behind him hold rows of containers and arcane apparatus. His robes and skin are pallid; the overall mood is unsettling, manic, and obsessive — a lab assistant who has clearly lost his grip.
foreground: deranged assistant figure with wide eyes, leaning forward over lab equipment
background: cluttered alchemical laboratory with shelves of jars, beakers, and bottled specimens
emotion: manic, obsessive, unhinged — bulging eyes and fixated stare suggest someone who has lost touch with reality
